targets.query:
from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_tags")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.alias =~ /volt/i)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_tags")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.alias =~ /current/i)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_tags")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.alias =~ /power/i)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_tags")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.alias =~ /volt/i)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_tags")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.alias =~ /current/i)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_tags")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.alias =~ /power/i)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_tags")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.alias =~ /factor|freq/i)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "plc4x_raw")
  |> range(start: -1m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "plc4x_tags")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.device == "${device}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "value")
  |> last()
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["alias", "_value", "_time"])
